name: tv2tv-interleaved-language-video
description: Unified framework for interleaved language and video generation in both directions
content:
## TV2TV: Interleaved Language and Video

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.05103 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.05103

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
